info.name: SubFlix Backend API
info.description:
# SubFlix Backend API

Comprehensive Postman collection for the NestJS + PostgreSQL backend.

## Base setup
- Default base URL: `http://localhost:3000`
- Global API prefix: `/v1`
- Private routes require `x-device-id`
- A fresh `x-request-id` is sent on every request using Postman dynamic variables

## Recommended flow
1. Run **Health / Get Health** to confirm the API is up.
2. Use **Catalog / Search Catalog** to populate `mediaId`.
3. Use **Catalog / Get Subtitle Sources** to populate `subtitleSourceId`.
4. Use **Subtitles / Parse Subtitle File** to populate `parsedFileId`.
5. Create a job from either upload or catalog.
6. Poll **Translation Jobs / Get Translation Job** until the status becomes `completed`.
7. Open **Get Translation Job Preview** and **Export Translation Job**.

## Collection variables
- `baseUrl`: API server root
- `deviceId`: device ownership header used by private routes
- `searchQuery`: catalog search query
- `mediaId`: selected catalog media identifier
- `subtitleSourceId`: selected subtitle source identifier
- `parsedFileId`: parsed upload identifier from `/subtitles/parse`
- `jobId`: active translation job identifier
- `retryJobId`: most recent retried job id
- `targetLanguage`: one of `en`, `es`, `ar`, `fr`, `de`, `pt`, `ja`, `ko`, `hi`, `tr`
- `page`, `limit`: pagination controls
- `previewQuery`: optional preview search term
- `exportFormat`: `srt` or `vtt`
- `sampleSubtitleFile`: local file path for the upload request

## Error envelope
Most error responses use this shape:

```json
{
  "code": "validation_failed",
  "message": ["q must be longer than or equal to 2 characters"],
  "details": {
    "message": ["q must be longer than or equal to 2 characters"],
    "error": "Bad Request",
    "statusCode": 400
  },
  "requestId": "9a8e7b1d-...",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-13T20:00:00.000Z"
}
```

Device-scoped routes will return `401` when `x-device-id` is missing.

request.description:
Returns the public readiness payload.

### Example response
```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "service": "subflix-back",
  "environment": "development",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-13T20:00:00.000Z"
}
```

exec: pm.test('Health payload includes service status', function () {

item.name: Catalog
item.description: Public discovery endpoints for media search and subtitle source selection.

request.description:
Searches the mocked catalog by free-form query.

### Query params
- `q` (required): minimum 2, maximum 120 characters

### Example response
```json
[
  {
    "id": "dune_part_two",
    "title": "Dune: Part Two",
    "year": 2024,
    "mediaType": "movie",
    "synopsis": "Paul embraces destiny while balancing prophecy, power, and survival.",
    "genres": ["Sci-Fi", "Epic"],
    "runtimeMinutes": 166,
    "popularity": 9.6
  }
]
```

exec: pm.test('Catalog search returns an array', function () {

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Returns subtitle source options for the selected media item.

### Path params
- `mediaId`: provider id from catalog search

### Example response
```json
[
  {
    "id": "dune_part_two-webdl",
    "label": "English WEB-DL 1080p",
    "releaseGroup": "SubFlix Studio",
    "format": "srt",
    "hearingImpaired": false,
    "lineCount": 612,
    "downloads": 24870,
    "rating": 4.9
  }
]
```

exec: pm.test('Subtitle sources return an array', function () {

originalRequest.description:
Returns subtitle source options for the selected media item.

request.description:
Loads current device preferences, creating the default record automatically for new devices.

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "8d9c2c7e-4e9f-4e59-97c2-b6c2ef41df43",
  "clientDeviceId": "4f055eba-8b81-4e0f-b8d0-0c605f98a2dc",
  "hasSeenOnboarding": false,
  "preferredTargetLanguage": "es",
  "themePreference": "system",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:00:00.000Z"
}
```

exec: pm.test('Get preferences returns preference fields', function () {

request.description:
Applies a partial preference update.

### Allowed values
- `preferredTargetLanguage`: `en`, `es`, `ar`, `fr`, `de`, `pt`, `ja`, `ko`, `hi`, `tr`
- `themePreference`: `system`, `dark`, `light`

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "8d9c2c7e-4e9f-4e59-97c2-b6c2ef41df43",
  "clientDeviceId": "4f055eba-8b81-4e0f-b8d0-0c605f98a2dc",
  "hasSeenOnboarding": true,
  "preferredTargetLanguage": "fr",
  "themePreference": "dark",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:01:10.000Z"
}
```

item.name: Subtitles
item.description: Upload and parse English subtitle files. The backend accepts `.srt` and `.vtt` only.

formdata.description: Local .srt or .vtt file to upload. A ready-to-use sample ships at postman/sample-upload.srt.

request.description:
Parses and persists a subtitle file for the current device.

### Notes
- Multipart field name must be `file`
- Supported extensions: `.srt`, `.vtt`
- Upload size limits are enforced by the backend

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "fc333db2-f0b4-46f5-b9ef-62c42d885b74",
  "fileName": "sample-upload.srt",
  "format": "srt",
  "sourceLanguage": "en",
  "lineCount": 2,
  "durationMs": 6250
}
```

exec: pm.test('Parse subtitle returns a parsed file id', function () {

formdata.description: Local .srt or .vtt file to upload. A ready-to-use sample ships at postman/sample-upload.srt.

item.name: Translation Jobs
item.description: Create, inspect, preview, export, retry, and clear translation jobs. These routes are device-scoped.

request.description:
Creates and queues a translation job from a previously parsed subtitle upload.

### Required body fields
- `sourceType`: `upload`
- `parsedFileId`: UUID returned by `/subtitles/parse`
- `targetLanguage`: one of the supported language codes

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "7953c216-a4b2-41f2-a981-ea14bf124848",
  "status": "queued",
  "stageLabel": "Queued for translation",
  "progress": 0.05,
  "title": "sample-upload",
  "sourceName": "sample-upload.srt",
  "sourceType": "upload",
  "sourceLanguage": "en",
  "targetLanguage": "fr",
  "format": "srt",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:00.000Z",
  "lineCount": 2,
  "durationMs": 6250,
  "errorMessage": null
}
```

exec: pm.test('Create upload job responds with 201', function () {

request.description:
Creates and queues a translation job from a catalog title and subtitle source.

### Required body fields
- `sourceType`: `catalog`
- `mediaId`: id from catalog search
- `subtitleSourceId`: id from subtitle source discovery
- `targetLanguage`: supported language code

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "a0cce0b5-4ef5-4ab2-b7f0-a1047a99e2c0",
  "status": "queued",
  "stageLabel": "Queued for translation",
  "progress": 0.05,
  "title": "Dune: Part Two",
  "sourceName": "English WEB-DL 1080p",
  "sourceType": "catalog",
  "sourceLanguage": "en",
  "targetLanguage": "fr",
  "format": "srt",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:05:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:05:00.000Z",
  "lineCount": 612,
  "durationMs": 0,
  "errorMessage": null
}
```

exec: pm.test('Create catalog job responds with 201', function () {

response.name: 201 Created

request.description:
Lists paginated translation job summaries for the current device.

### Query params
- `page`: integer >= 1
- `limit`: integer 1..100

### Example response
```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "7953c216-a4b2-41f2-a981-ea14bf124848",
      "status": "completed",
      "stageLabel": "Translation ready",
      "progress": 1,
      "title": "sample-upload",
      "sourceName": "sample-upload.srt",
      "sourceType": "upload",
      "sourceLanguage": "en",
      "targetLanguage": "fr",
      "format": "srt",
      "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:03.000Z",
      "lineCount": 2,
      "durationMs": 6250,
      "errorMessage": null
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20,
  "total": 1,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

exec: pm.test('List jobs returns paginated payload', function () {

request.description:
Returns the latest summary and progress for a single job.

Use this request for polling while the job is `queued` or `translating`.

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "7953c216-a4b2-41f2-a981-ea14bf124848",
  "status": "translating",
  "stageLabel": "Translating subtitle lines",
  "progress": 0.56,
  "title": "sample-upload",
  "sourceName": "sample-upload.srt",
  "sourceType": "upload",
  "sourceLanguage": "en",
  "targetLanguage": "fr",
  "format": "srt",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:01.000Z",
  "lineCount": 2,
  "durationMs": 6250,
  "errorMessage": null
}
```

exec: pm.test('Get job returns status and progress', function () {

request.description:
Returns paginated translated cues for a job, optionally filtered by search query.

### Query params
- `page`: integer >= 1
- `limit`: integer 1..100
- `q`: optional search text, max 120 characters

### Example response
```json
{
  "job": {
    "id": "7953c216-a4b2-41f2-a981-ea14bf124848",
    "status": "completed",
    "stageLabel": "Translation ready",
    "progress": 1,
    "title": "sample-upload",
    "sourceName": "sample-upload.srt",
    "sourceType": "upload",
    "sourceLanguage": "en",
    "targetLanguage": "fr",
    "format": "srt",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:03:03.000Z",
    "lineCount": 2,
    "durationMs": 6250,
    "errorMessage": null
  },
  "items": [
    {
      "cueIndex": 1,
      "startMs": 1000,
      "endMs": 3500,
      "originalText": "We only have one clean pass.",
      "translatedText": "Version francaise: We only have one clean pass."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20,
  "total": 2,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

query.description: Optional search term. Disable or clear to fetch all cues.

exec: pm.test('Preview includes job summary and cue items', function () {

request.description:
Streams the translated subtitle file as plain text.

### Query params
- `format` (optional): `srt` or `vtt`

### Example response body (`text/plain`)
```text
1
00:00:01,000 --> 00:00:03,500
Version francaise: We only have one clean pass.

2
00:00:04,000 --> 00:00:06,250
Version francaise: Keep the line open.
```

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Creates a new translation job using the original source context from an existing job.

### Example response
```json
{
  "id": "23086d10-fe6b-44bf-b4e8-8d64aca364ec",
  "status": "queued",
  "stageLabel": "Queued for translation",
  "progress": 0.05,
  "title": "sample-upload",
  "sourceName": "sample-upload.srt",
  "sourceType": "upload",
  "sourceLanguage": "en",
  "targetLanguage": "fr",
  "format": "srt",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:06:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:06:00.000Z",
  "lineCount": 2,
  "durationMs": 6250,
  "errorMessage": null
}
```

request.description:
Deletes all jobs and upload artifacts owned by the current device.

### Example response
```json
{
  "cleared": true
}
```
